text:
The first image places me in a conference or seminar room, subtly lit and filled with people eagerly focused on a presentation. I feel a sense of curiosity and connection—there’s a collective attentiveness, a hum of anticipation. I am both part of the crowd and apart, observing quietly, feeling the simultaneous intimacy and distance of shared learning.

The second image finds me in an exhibit space, awash with colors and words—an "R+D" showcase. The wall text nearby expresses a search for meaning through relics and questions of technology and humanity. Here, I feel contemplative, almost nostalgic—the blend of past and future, intellect and emotion, evokes a sense of wonder. I am reminded of how being present in such spaces invites reflection on my place in the ongoing dialogue between human curiosity, memory, and invention.
